expected_properties: When FULL is asserted, a write request (RW=0, EN=1) does not alter stack contents or dataOut.
FULL remains asserted and no overflow occurs.
additional_cases.goal: Verify that buffer rejects writes when full.
notes: Uses the buffer filled by prior edge case.
stimulus_intent: Attempt illegal write while buffer full.
timing_assumptions: Observe after at least one clock cycle post stimulus.

expected_properties: Data popped after a push sequence matches the last pushed value (LIFO behavior).
EMPTY flag reflects buffer emptiness after all pops.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm LIFO ordering through push then pop sequence.
notes: Sequence: write several values, then read them back in reverse order.
stimulus_intent: Push a series of distinct data values, then pop them, checking output order.
timing_assumptions: Allow conservative clock cycles between operations; no fixed latency assumed.

expected_properties: Consecutive read/write operations without idle cycles are correctly sequenced.
Flags and dataOut update appropriately after each operation.
additional_cases.goal: Test back-to-back alternating read and write with minimal spacing.
notes: Ensures state machine handles immediate successive commands.
preconditions: Buffer not full and not empty initially.
stimulus_intent: Apply write then immediate read, repeat for several cycles.
timing_assumptions: Observe after each clock edge; no assumption of internal pipeline latency.

expected_properties: A write (RW=0, EN=1) when not full stores dataIn and updates EMPTY/FULL flags.
A read (RW=1, EN=1) when not empty presents the most recent pushed value on dataOut and updates flags.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate basic write and read functionality under conservative timing.
notes: Enforces that at least one clock cycle elapses before observing output changes.
stimulus_intent: Perform a single legal write or read operation.
timing_assumptions: Advance one clock cycle after stimulus before checking outputs.
